en: OF DAVID. Fret not yourself because of evildoers; be not envious of wrongdoers!
zh: 不要因作惡的人心懷不平， 不要因犯罪的人產生嫉妒。

en: For they will soon fade like the grass and wither like the green herb.
zh: 因為他們好像草快要枯乾， 像即將凋萎的青草。

en: Trust in the LORD, and do good; dwell in the land and befriend faithfulness.
zh: 你要倚靠耶和華，並要行善； 你要住在地上，以信實為糧食。

en: Delight yourself in the LORD, and he will give you the desires of your heart.
zh: 你要以耶和華為樂， 他就把你心裡所求的賜給你。

en: Commit your way to the LORD; trust in him, and he will act.
zh: 你要把你的道路交託耶和華， 並倚靠他，他就必成全。

en: He will bring forth your righteousness as the light, and your justice as the noonday.
zh: 他必使你的公義好像光發出， 使你的公正如日中天。

en: Be still before the LORD and wait patiently for him; fret not yourself over the one who prospers in his way, over the man who carries out evil devices!
zh: 你要在耶和華面前靜默無聲， 耐心地等候他； 不要因那凡事順利的， 和那惡謀得逞的，心懷不平。

en: Refrain from anger, and forsake wrath! Fret not yourself; it tends only to evil.
zh: 你要抑制怒氣，消除烈怒； 不要心懷不平，那只會導致你作惡。

en: For the evildoers shall be cut off, but those who wait for the LORD shall inherit the land.
zh: 因為作惡的必被剪除， 但等候耶和華的必承受地土。

en: In just a little while, the wicked will be no more; though you look carefully at his place, he will not be there.
zh: 再過不久，惡人就不存在了； 你到他的地方尋找，也找不到。

en: But the meek shall inherit the land and delight themselves in abundant peace.
zh: 但謙卑的人必承受地土， 可以享受豐盛的平安。

en: The wicked plots against the righteous and gnashes his teeth at him,
zh: 惡人謀害義人， 向他咬牙切齒；

en: but the Lord laughs at the wicked, for he sees that his day is coming.
zh: 但主必笑他， 因為知道他遭報的日子快要來到。

en: The wicked draw the sword and bend their bows to bring down the poor and needy, to slay those whose way is upright;
zh: 惡人已經拔出刀來，拉開了弓， 要打倒困苦和貧窮的人， 殺害行為正直的人。

en: their sword shall enter their own heart, and their bows shall be broken.
zh: 他們的刀必刺入自己的心， 他們的弓必被折斷。

en: Better is the little that the righteous has than the abundance of many wicked.
zh: 一個義人擁有的雖少， 勝過許多惡人的財富。

en: For the arms of the wicked shall be broken, but the LORD upholds the righteous.
zh: 因為惡人的膀臂必被折斷， 耶和華卻扶持義人。

en: The LORD knows the days of the blameless, and their heritage will remain forever;
zh: 耶和華眷顧完全人在世的日子， 他們的產業必存到永遠。

en: they are not put to shame in evil times; in the days of famine they have abundance.
zh: 在患難的時候，他們必不蒙羞； 在饑荒的日子，他們必得飽足。

en: But the wicked will perish; the enemies of the LORD are like the glory of the pastures; they vanish- like smoke they vanish away.
zh: 惡人卻必滅亡； 耶和華的仇敵好像草場的華美， 他們必要消失，像煙一般消失。

en: The wicked borrows but does not pay back, but the righteous is generous and gives;
zh: 惡人借貸總不償還， 義人卻慷慨施捨。

en: for those blessed by the LORD shall inherit the land, but those cursed by him shall be cut off.
zh: 蒙耶和華賜福的，必承受地土； 受他咒詛的，必被剪除。

en: The steps of a man are established by the LORD, when he delights in his way;
zh: 人的腳步是耶和華立定的， 他的道路也是耶和華喜悅的。

en: though he fall, he shall not be cast headlong, for the LORD upholds his hand.
zh: 他雖然跌跤，卻不至仆倒； 因為耶和華用手扶持他。

en: I have been young, and now am old, yet I have not seen the righteous forsaken or his children begging for bread.
zh: 我從前年幼，現在年老， 從未見過義人被棄， 也從未見過他的後裔討飯。

en: He is ever lending generously, and his children become a blessing.
zh: 他常常慷慨借給人； 他的後裔必定蒙福。

en: Turn away from evil and do good; so shall you dwell forever.
zh: 應當離惡行善， 你就可以永遠安居。

en: For the LORD loves justice; he will not forsake his saints. They are preserved forever, but the children of the wicked shall be cut off.
zh: 因為耶和華喜愛公正， 也不撇棄他的聖民； 他們必永遠蒙庇佑， 惡人的後裔卻必被剪除。

en: The righteous shall inherit the land and dwell upon it forever.
zh: 義人必承受地土， 永遠居住在自己的地上。

en: The mouth of the righteous utters wisdom, and his tongue speaks justice.
zh: 義人的口說出智慧， 他的舌頭講論正義。

en: The law of his God is in his heart; his steps do not slip.
zh: 神的律法在他心裡， 他的腳步必不滑跌。

en: The wicked watches for the righteous and seeks to put him to death.
zh: 惡人窺伺義人， 想要殺死他。

en: The LORD will not abandon him to his power or let him be condemned when he is brought to trial.
zh: 耶和華必不把他撇棄在惡人的手中， 在審判的時候，也不定他的罪。

en: Wait for the LORD and keep his way, and he will exalt you to inherit the land; you will look on when the wicked are cut off.
zh: 你要等候耶和華，謹守他的道； 他必高舉你，使你承受地土； 惡人被剪除的時候，你必看見。

en: I have seen a wicked, ruthless man, spreading himself like a green laurel tree.
zh: 我曾看見強暴的惡人興旺， 像樹木在本土茂盛。

en: But he passed away, and behold, he was no more; though I sought him, he could not be found.
zh: 但他很快就消逝，不再存在了； 我尋找他，卻找不到。

en: Mark the blameless and behold the upright, for there is a future for the man of peace.
zh: 你要細察完全人，觀看正直人； 因為愛和平的必有後代。

en: But transgressors shall be altogether destroyed; the future of the wicked shall be cut off.
zh: 犯罪的人必一同滅絕， 惡人的後代必被剪除。

en: The salvation of the righteous is from the LORD; he is their stronghold in the time of trouble.
zh: 義人的拯救是由耶和華而來； 在患難的時候，他作他們的避難所。

en: The LORD helps them and delivers them; he delivers them from the wicked and saves them, because they take refuge in him.
zh: 耶和華幫助他們，搭救他們； 他搭救他們脫離惡人，拯救他們， 因為他們投靠他。
